headline: Gold Climbs Above $5,300 an Ounce. Where It Goes Next Amid Middle East Fighting.
summary: Gold prices rose early Monday as investors flocked to haven assets amid heightened tensions in the Middle East. But it might be a false move.

headline: 10-year Treasury yield rises back above 4% as U.S.-Israel strikes fail to spark safe-haven buying
summary: U.S. Treasury yields moved higher on Monday as investors monitored geopolitical uncertainty after the U.S. and Israel launched attacks on Iran over the weekend.
